title: Sameer Automations — Smart systems. Built for your business.
description: Custom automations for small service businesses. Every lead gets a response in 60 seconds, every missed call gets a text back in 30, every job gets a review request. Built in days, not months.

og.title: Sameer Automations — Smart systems. Built for your business.
og.description: Custom automations for dental, salon, trades, cleaning, law, and other local service businesses. Recover missed calls, reply to leads in under a minute, and stop chasing reviews by hand.
